rows.feedback: The sales advisor listened carefully and helped me compare trims without pressure.
The salesperson kept pushing add-ons after I said I was not interested.
The test drive was helpful, but I waited too long before someone greeted me.
The team explained the vehicle features clearly and made the buying process simple.
The final monthly payment was higher than what was discussed online.
Finance paperwork took almost three hours and several fees were not explained.
The finance manager found a better rate than my bank and explained the terms well.
Loan options were presented clearly, but the wait for approval was too long.
The advertised price did not include mandatory dealer add-ons.
I felt misled by the online price because the quote changed at the dealership.
The price was fair and the final invoice matched the quote.
Discounts were good, but the fee breakdown should be easier to understand.
The car listed online was already sold when I arrived for my appointment.
Inventory filters on the website are useful but some colors are listed incorrectly.
They had several trims available and helped me find the right configuration.
I drove across town for a vehicle that was marked available but unavailable in store.
The trade-in offer was much lower than the estimate I received online.
The appraisal was quick and the trade-in credit was clearly applied to my purchase.
Trade-in inspection was fair, but I wanted more explanation about the valuation.
My trade-in quote changed twice during the same visit.
Service was fast and the advisor sent updates while my car was being repaired.
The repair took two days longer than promised and nobody called me.
The oil change was fine, but the waiting area was overcrowded.
The same warning light came back the day after service.
The replacement part was delayed and I had to call multiple times for updates.
Parts staff found the correct accessory and installed it the same afternoon.
The part arrived on time, but the installation appointment was hard to schedule.
Home delivery was smooth and the specialist walked me through the vehicle settings.
The vehicle was delivered with low tire pressure and no floor mats.
Pickup was organized, but the final detailing could have been better.
The delivery appointment was missed and I had to reschedule twice.
The website made it easy to compare vehicles and calculate estimated payments.
The payment calculator does not match the numbers provided by finance.
Online chat answered basic questions, but could not confirm real inventory.
I submitted a lead form and never received a response.
Everyone followed up quickly and kept me informed during the purchase.
I received too many calls after asking to communicate by email only.
Communication was polite but inconsistent between sales and finance.
Nobody returned my voicemail about a warranty question.
The warranty options were explained clearly without pressure.
I was not told which warranty items were optional until the final paperwork.
Coverage seems good, but the exclusions should be easier to read.
The showroom was clean and the vehicle was spotless at pickup.
The used vehicle still had stains inside when I came for delivery.
The showroom was nice, but the service waiting area needs more seating.
The receptionist quickly connected me to the right department.
I was transferred three times before someone could answer my question.
The support line disconnected twice while I was checking service status.
Staff were friendly, but follow-up after purchase could be more proactive.
